Wonder.gist: You naturally ponder things and ask big questions

Invention.gist: You naturally create new and original ideas and solutions to problems

Discernment.gist: You naturally use intuition to refine and assess ideas

Galvanizing.gist: You naturally rally people around actions or ideas

Enablement.gist: You naturally provide help and support around ideas and projects

Tenacity.gist: You naturally drive projects and tasks to completion
